name: anna_card_block_stolen
description: Customer reports her Visa Debit card stolen at Mediamarkt Alexanderplatz; two unrecognized transactions already on the account.  Tests known-context (we already see the flagged charges), urgency handling, and proper escalation framing.
caller_turns: Hi, I think my Visa Debit card was stolen.  I went to Mediamarkt at Alexanderplatz this evening and now my wallet's gone.
I last used it there at the till — about half an hour ago.  Something around 40 euros for a charger cable.
Wait — there are two charges I don't recognize, both Mediamarkt, like 189 and 450 euros.  Those aren't mine.
No, I haven't called the police yet.  Should I?  I'm a bit shaken.
Yes, please send the new card to the address on file.  And — uh — should I block the girocard too just in case?
